title: Signal at Red Harbor
summary: A distress transmission points back to a vanished customs officer.
handlerPrompts: Trace who had access to the midnight dispatch log.
Check cargo records against harbor camera timestamps.

evidence.title: Dispatch Log
evidence.summary: The midnight distress burst originated from a transmitter listed as out of service.

evidence.title: Night Watch Exchange
evidence.summary: Night-shift messages tie the vanished customs officer to the signal room before the false distress call.
